title: microlicia deflexa
intro: Microlicia deflexa is a plant species that belongs to the family Melastomataceae. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been shown to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, Microlicia deflexa is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
